published.title: Morning Mercy
published.devotionalMessage: The mercy of God is new this morning. Start today with gratitude, not guilt.
published.practicalApplication: Name three mercies you already received today.
published.callToAction: Begin your day with thanksgiving prayer.

published.title: Peace in the Storm
published.devotionalMessage: Jesus still speaks peace over every storm and anxious thought.
published.practicalApplication: Pause and pray before reacting to pressure today.

published.title: Still Waters Reflection
published.devotionalMessage: God leads your soul into stillness, not noise.
published.practicalApplication: Take five quiet minutes with this verse.

published.title: Strength Text
published.devotionalMessage: You are not alone today. Grace is enough for this assignment.
published.practicalApplication: Send this encouragement to one friend.

published.title: A Short Word on Prayer
published.devotionalMessage: Prayer is the first response, not the last resort. Daily surrender forms lasting faith.
published.practicalApplication: Pray once before each major task today.
published.callToAction: Build a rhythm of first-response prayer.

published.title: Built on the Rock
published.devotionalMessage: A durable life is built through repeated obedience. Storms reveal foundations, and faithful habits form spiritual resilience over time.
published.practicalApplication: Create a weekly schedule for scripture and prayer.
published.callToAction: Build your life on Christ with consistent obedience.
